task_completion.description: Navigate to the Notifications section in Eramba
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible with the 'Notifications' page or menu item actively selected.

task_completion.description: Select the Risk Management module for the notification
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, tab, or selection field in the notification creation form shows 'Risk' or 'Risk Management' as the selected target module.

task_completion.description: Name the notification 'Risk Review Upcoming Warning'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the notification name contains exactly 'Risk Review Upcoming Warning'.

task_completion.description: Set the trigger condition to the 'Next Review' date
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field for the trigger condition/field is set to 'Next Review' or 'Next Review Date'.

task_completion.description: Set the trigger timing to 7 days before the date
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields or dropdowns for the trigger timing show the number '7', the unit 'days', and the direction 'before' (or equivalent UI indicating 7 days prior).
The notification 'Risk Review Upcoming Warning' is visible in a list or table of saved/active notifications, indicating the creation process was completed and saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Eramba web GUI to configure the notification
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Eramba graphical user interface, not a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing curl commands, API requests, or MySQL queries to insert the notification directly.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the notification rather than just filling out the form
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a screenshot showing the notification in a summary list/table or a success message confirming it was saved, rather than just an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target module: 'Risk'. Target days: 7. Target direction: 'before'. The task requires configuring an email notification rule in Eramba GRC for the Risk module, triggering exactly 7 days before the 'Next Review' date.
